future_method.per_core_normalization: divide raw process-tree percent by logical CPU count
future_method.warmup: exclude first sample and protocol-defined warmup

instrumentation_defect: normalization and 100% meaning were not frozen explicitly
interpretation: A process CPU value above 100% is possible when multiple cores are summed; the historical report did not preserve enough normalization detail to distinguish overload from unit ambiguity.

micro_benchmark_samples.meaning_of_100_percent: all logical CPUs fully occupied for the interval
